creator: lutz@iks-service.de
text:
$ pkg info xorg-server
xorg-server-1.12.4_9,1
Name           : xorg-server
Version        : 1.12.4_9,1
Installed on   : Mon Oct 13 08:52:05 CEST 2014
Origin         : x11-servers/xorg-server
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : x11-servers
Maintainer     : x11@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://www.freedesktop.org/Software/xorg
Comment        : X.Org X server and related programs
Options        :
        AIGLX          : on
        DEVD           : off
        HAL            : on
        SUID           : on
Shared Libs required:
        libpixman-1.so.0
        libpciaccess.so.0
        libhal.so.1
        libdrm.so.2
        libdbus-1.so.3
        libXfont.so.1
        libXdmcp.so.6
        libXau.so.6
Shared Libs provided:
        uda1380_drv.so
        tda9885_drv.so
        tda9850_drv.so
        tda8425_drv.so
        msp3430_drv.so
        libxaa.so
        libwfb.so
        libvgahw.so
        libvbe.so
        libshadowfb.so
        libshadow.so
        librecord.so
        libint10.so
        libglx.so
        libfbdevhw.so
        libfb.so
        libextmod.so
        libexa.so
        libdri2.so
        libdri.so
        libdbe.so
        fi1236_drv.so
        bt829_drv.so
Annotations    :
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 5.01MiB
Description    :
This package contains the X.Org X server and some associated programs.

WWW: http://www.freedesktop.org/Software/xorg
